title: Unlock PDF — Remove Password Offline
description: Unlock password-protected PDFs directly in your browser if you know the password. 100% private. Perfect for users in Tokyo.

sections.title: Why Unlock PDFs Locally?
sections.content: You have the password to your own file. Unlocking it should not require uploading it to an external service.

steps.title: Enter Password
steps.description: Provide the existing password to decrypt the file.

steps.title: Download Unlocked PDF
steps.description: Get your unlocked, unencrypted PDF ready to use.

sections.title: PDF Unlocking in Tokyo
sections.content: Users in Tokyo trust our offline unlocking tool to access their own password-protected documents.

sections.title: Passwords Never Leave Your Browser
sections.content: Your decryption key and document are processed entirely in browser memory — never transmitted.

sections.title: Instant Decryption
sections.content: AES decryption in your browser takes milliseconds, far faster than any cloud service.

faqs.q: Does it work without the password?
faqs.a: No, you must know the existing password to unlock.
Yes, permission restrictions are removed after password verification.
All decryption happens in your browser memory; nothing is transmitted.

faqs.q: What if the password is wrong?
faqs.a: You will see an error and can try again with the correct password.
